description.p: Altirra is a highly accurate Atari 8-bit computer emulator supporting the Atari 400/800, XL, XE, and 5200 systems. It features cycle-accurate emulation of all major chips (ANTIC, GTIA, POKEY, PIA), multiple CPU cores (6502, 65C02, 65C816), and an integrated debugger.

Key features include built-in replacement firmware (AltirraOS), extensive peripheral device support (disk drives, cassette, printers, modems, hard drives), networking via emulated modem, video recording, and a powerful debugging environment with disassembler, memory viewer, profiler, and trace viewer.
Linux port of Altirra 4.40 with SDL2/OpenGL display, ImGui interface, and full emulation feature parity.
